title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0451
summary: 1 The Alien Property Custodian1 on April 22, 1946, began this action under § 17 of the Trading with the Enemy Act, 50 U.S.C.A.Appendix, § 17, in the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York to obtain the payment, and a declaration of title in him as against the petitione...
